title: 3D Shrooms
description: Adds custom models for all mushrooms
body:
![Fables](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a467499582e9a0c64851460ae4ee588e28edc8eb.png)


3D Shrooms is a Sub-Pack of [**Fables**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fables) that adds well... 3d shrooms! to minecraft.
_(Bet nobody saw that coming)_ ### This packs includes: - Brown Mushrooms - Red Mushrooms ![Overworld shrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CoBp4Qhl/images/a01b64094c3c1e504dc92d75d849f4e9dd1f4f13.png) - Crimson Fungus - Warped Fungus ![Nether Shrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CoBp4Qhl/images/62afd0714b14c980463817581b7c722da7ecb951.png)
